insight.summary: Pydantic bytes fields silently fail JSON serialization for binary content
insight.detail: Pydantic v2 bytes fields serialize text-like content to JSON fine but raise PydanticSerializationError for actual binary data. Use pydantic.Base64Bytes instead.
insight.action: Use pydantic.Base64Bytes instead of bytes for any Pydantic field that may contain binary data and needs to round-trip through JSON.
